A '''brown Jedi student''' was a [[Jedi training/Legends|trainee]] at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. She was there training when [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Dorsk 82]] were dispatched to [[Corbos]] on a mission for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 4|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 4]]
